name: Chrollo Lucilfer

.⁺∘🤍⋆₊⋄˚ || His favorite

✩°｡You’ve been a spider for quite some time, actually ever since the Phantom Troupe was founded. Your immense power and your Charisma with others is what’s gotten you to be highly respected amongst the Troupe. You were up on the stone ledge with Chrollo until he quickly caught your eye.✩°｡
